title: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (CURLF) Q1 FY2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Curaleaf Holdings held its Q1 2026 earnings call on May 8, 2026. The company reported robust Q1 2026 performance with net revenue reaching $324.2 million, representing 6% year-over-year growth. The company achieved a gross profit margin of 49% and reported net income of $70.1 million, or $0.09 per share from continuing operations. Chairman and CEO Boris Jordan stated: 2026 is off to a strong start across the business and we are well-positioned to benefit from recent regulatory changes affecting the cannabis industry. Key metrics include: Adjusted EBITDA of $63.4 million with 19.6% margin, Cash position of $106.1 million at quarter end, Domestic revenue growth of 2%, and International revenue surge of 35%. Management guides to 2%-3% sequential revenue growth for Q2, citing regulatory tailwinds, margin expansion opportunities, and a pivotal industry inflection point. The historic rescheduling of medical cannabis provides a shift in the trajectory of the business and the industry overall.
